name: Yifeng Pharmacy Chain Co., Ltd.
summary: Yifeng Pharmacy Chain Co., Ltd. retails pharmaceutical products in China. The company primarily offers ENT, dermatology, gastroenterology, rheumatology, andrology, gynecology, pediatric, body slimming, and nutrition products. It operates approximately 680 pharmaceutical chain stores in Hunan, Hubei, Shanghai, Jiangsu, Zhejiang, Jiangxi, and other six provinces and cities. The company is based in Changsha, China.
